message:
Fix layout coordinate assignment for reversed ranks, add Mermaid node shapes, and support theme overrides in SVG

Layout engine (fm-layout):
- Fix coordinate_assignment to iterate ranks in reverse order when
  reverse_ranks is true, instead of computing offsets forward and
  flipping indices afterward; resolves incorrect node positioning
  in bottom-to-top (BT) and right-to-left (RL) directed graphs
- Remove erroneous dedup() on outgoing edge targets in rank_assignment
  that silently dropped valid parallel edges between the same node pair

Parser (fm-parser):
- Add cylinder [(label)], subroutine [[label]], and asymmetric >label]
  node shape recognition in the Mermaid parser, with a new
  parse_wrapped_str helper for multi-character delimiters
- Rewrite split_statements to be quote-aware so semicolons inside
  quoted node labels (e.g. A["a;b"]) no longer incorrectly split statements
- Fix DOT edge chain attribute parsing: shared attributes like [label="x"]
  on A -> B -> C are now applied to all edges in the chain rather than
  only the last segment

SVG renderer (fm-render-svg):
- Honor Mermaid init directive theme and themeVariables overrides when
  embedding CSS, mapping standard Mermaid variable names (primaryColor,
  lineColor, clusterBkg, etc.) to internal theme color fields

CLI (fm-cli):
- Explicitly set glyph_mode to Ascii when rendering in ASCII format

Terminal renderer (fm-render-term):
- Simplify term_stats to read node/edge counts directly from the IR
  instead of running a full layout pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
